---
title: "beneign"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
beneign = read.csv('BenignTraffic.pcap_Flow.csv')
beneign1 = read.csv('BenignTraffic1.pcap_Flow.csv')
beneign2 = read.csv('BenignTraffic2.pcap_Flow.csv')
beneign3 = read.csv('BenignTraffic3.pcap_Flow.csv')


```

```{r}
colnames(beneign)

head(beneign)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
glimpse(beneign)

skimr::skim(beneign)


```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

library(readr)
library(purrr)

path <- path.expand("~/Documents/UVic/Summer 2026/ECE 592B Professionalism part III/Capstone/Flow Based")
files <- list.files(path = path, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

# Load and combine all CSVs into a single data frame
df <- map_df(files, read_csv)
```
